description: Discussion triage fixtures for informational, answered, and no-response classifications

informational.description: Discussion is purely informational, no action required

answered.description: Question has been answered, can be closed

bug-report.description: User reporting a bug, needs investigation

fixtures.title: How to parse amount with comma separator?
fixtures.body: I'm trying to input 'Beli kopi 1,5jt' but the parser returns wrong amount. Is this supported?

fixtures.title: Great app, thanks!
fixtures.body: Just wanted to say thanks for this app, works perfectly for my daily expenses.

fixtures.title: Firebase sync not working
fixtures.body: After logging in with Google, my transactions don't sync to Firebase. Getting error: permission denied.

fixtures.title: Add support for recurring transactions
fixtures.body: It would be great if we could set up recurring transactions like monthly subscriptions.

fixtures.title: Re: How to export data?
fixtures.body: Thanks! The export button worked. You can close this.

fixtures.title: Parser doesn't recognize 'semalam'
fixtures.body: When I input 'Makan malam 50rb semalam', the date is not set to yesterday.

fixtures.title: Update: New category colors added
fixtures.body: FYI - Added new color scheme for categories in v1.2.0

fixtures.title: Need help setting up Firebase
fixtures.body: Can someone help me configure Firebase for my own deployment? The docs are unclear.

responseTemplates.needs-investigation: Thanks for reporting! We'll investigate this issue and get back to you.
responseTemplates.bug-investigation:
Thanks for the bug report. We're looking into this. Can you provide:
1. Browser version
2. Steps to reproduce
3. Expected vs actual behavior
responseTemplates.documentation-request: Thanks for the feedback! We'll update the documentation to be clearer.
responseTemplates.feature-acknowledgment: Thanks for the suggestion! We've added this to our roadmap.

triageWorkflow: Set follow-up reminder for unanswered questions
